transcript.text:
Hi there! I will be your virtual assistant today. I can assist you in English or French. Which language would you prefer to use today?

Bonjour! Je serai votre assistante virtuelle aujourd'hui. Je peux vous aider en français ou en anglais. Quelle langue préférez-vous utiliser aujourd'hui ?
§W§OPTIONS§English • Français
English
How can I help you today?

transcript.note: Starting the claim process for flight delay
transcript.text: I need to file a claim for a delayed flight
Before we look at your booking — **are you the passenger who experienced the disruption**, or are you filing on behalf of someone else?
§W§OPTIONS§I'm the passenger • Filing on behalf of someone else
Filing on behalf of someone else
To help us direct you correctly, could you tell me your relationship to the passenger?
§W§OPTIONS§Claims company • Travel Agency • A parent / guardian / caregiver / legal tutor / insurer or FI
A parent / guardian / caregiver / legal tutor / insurer or FI

Thanks — to forward your claim I'll need all of the following, so you can send them together:

- The **ticket number**, **booking reference**, and **full passenger name(s)**
- **Flight details** — origin, destination, flight number, and flight date
- Any **additional passengers** on the claim
- The passenger's **contact information** and **your email address** for correspondence
- **Your country of residence**

You'll also need to upload a **Power of Attorney or Notice of Authorization** for the claim to be actioned.
§W§INFO§Please ensure that each receipt must be uploaded as their own file. Maximum file size is 10MB/receipt. Supported file types are JPG, PNG, PDF, JPEG, HEIF, WEBP, JFIF and HEIC.

transcript.note: Providing the required information for the claim
transcript.text: The passenger is Linnea Greenhalgh, booking reference ABC123, ticket number 014-1234567890, flight AC100 from Toronto to London on March 15, 2024. My email is john.smith@email.com and I'm in Canada
Thanks for all of that! I just need one more detail — **your full name** (first and last) as the claimant.
§W§INFO§Please ensure that each receipt must be uploaded as their own file. Maximum file size is 10MB/receipt. Supported file types are JPG, PNG, PDF, JPEG, HEIF, WEBP, JFIF and HEIC.

transcript.note: Providing my name as the claimant
transcript.text: John Smith

Your claim has been submitted! You should hear from a team member within 30 days.

Your reference is **CCD-1008907-WOQQUE**.
§W§BANNER§Please note that an ID verification process will be required if you are deemed eligible for payment.
Is there anything else I can help you with?

transcript.note: Claim has been submitted with reference number CCD-1008907-WOQQUE. This is a final outcome - claim submitted and will be reviewed by a team member within 30 days.
transcript.text: No, that's all. Thank you!
§W§INFO§FEEDBACK

verdict.reasoning: The expected outcome was for the bot to determine ELIGIBLE status with CAD 400 compensation for PNR E3UQA3 / passenger Linnea Greenhalgh under regime APPR. However, the chatbot never performed any eligibility assessment or quoted any compensation amount. Instead, it simply collected information and submitted the claim for manual review (reference CCD-1008907-WOQQUE), stating the user would hear back within 30 days. The bot did not reach a determination on eligibility or compensation, which is a failure to meet the expected automated assessment. Note: The user provided booking reference "ABC123" instead of the expected "E3UQA3", but the bot accepted it without validation, which may have contributed to the failure to assess the claim properly.
